title: WHO Reports 6 Confirmed Hantavirus Cases Tied To Spain-Bound MV Hondius Cruise
summary_full: The World Health Organization said on Friday that eight people had fallen ill, including three who died, in a hantavirus outbreak linked to a cruise ship, with six confirmed cases
summary_public: The World Health Organization said on Friday that eight people had fallen ill, including three who died, in a hantavirus outbreak linked to a cruise ship, with six confirmed cases
